title: Oura Ring Gen 4 Black, Silver, Stealth $398 + Delivery ($0 C&C/In-Store) @ JB Hi-Fi
body:
Deal: Oura Ring Gen 4 Black, Silver, Stealth $398 + Delivery ($0 C&C/In-Store) @ JB Hi-Fi

[Tarun Tuli] Subscription is annoying on these? Any ways to avoid them?
[randomdude14] Out of dozens of subs I pay, this is the thing that actually feels worth it
[ajeb] The downsides of these rings is pretty severe. Imagine a battery failure swelling on your finger.
[node modules] With the subscription, do I automatically get a refund if I get into a coma or die?
[mahdoo] Would buy in a heart beat, if it weren't for that damn subscription.
